calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

DENNIS CARR, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) TUN AUNG SOE,

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) BILLY RAY HUDSON, II for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $25,225.09
Costs - $355.00
Total judgment in the amount of $25,580.09

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
